code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    check(line)
  when None
    print("YES")
  end
end

fn check(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut have_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut sorted = true
  while i < n + 1
    mut is_ws = false
    mut b = 0
    if i == n
      is_ws = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        b = v
      when None
        b = 0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          if have_prev
            if v < prev
              sorted = false
            end
          end
          prev = v
          have_prev = true
        when None
          sorted = sorted
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if sorted
    print("YES")
  else
    print("NO")
  end
end
